hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if [[ "$fp" == *composer.lock ]] || [[ "$fp" == vendor/* ]] || [[ "$fp" == */vendor/* ]]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"deny\",\"reason\":\"Do not edit $fp directly\"}" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if [[ "$fp" == *.php ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && php vendor/bin/phpcbf --standard=PSR12 "$fp" 2>/dev/null; fi; true'
bash -c 'input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); if [[ "$fp" == *.php ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && composer phpstan 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; true'
